title: Galan starfighter
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{StarshipClass |image= |name=Galan starfighter |designer= |manufacturer= |line= |model= |type=[[Starfighter/Legends|Starfighter]]''[[Jedi Quest: The Master of Disguise]]'' |cost= |modifier= |sysmods= |length= |width= |height= |mass= |max accel= |mglt= |max speed= |maneuverability= |engine=[[Ion engine/Legends|Ion engines]]''[[Jedi Apprentice: The Defenders of the Dead]]'' |hyperdrive= |hdrange= |hdsystem=Equipped |poweroutput= |power= |shield gen= |hull= |sensor= |target=[[Emergency weapon sighting plate]] |navigation=Equipped |avionics= |maincomp= |countermeasures= |armament=[[Laser cannon/Legends|Laser cannons]] (at least 2) |complement=[[Swoop/Legends|Swoop]] bikes (at least 2) |bays= |escapepods= |crew=*[[Pilot/Legends|Pilot]] (1) *Co-pilot (1) |skeleton= |passengers=At least 1 |capacity= |cargohandling= |consumables= |lifesupport= |communications= |othersystems= |availability= |role=[[Transport/Legends|Transport]] |firstuse= |retired= |affiliation=*[[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] *[[Gala]] }} {{Quote|Watch it, you gravel-maggot!" [Anakin] yelled.
Beside him his Master, Obi-Wan Kenobi, cleared his throat.
"I know, I know ... 'Feel my anger, and let it go.' But do I have to be a Jedi all the time, even in space traffic?|14-year-old Jedi Padawan Anakin Skywalker, piloting a Galan starfighter, fires an expletive at a cruiser pilot cutting in the line waiting to land on the planet Euceron for the [[Galactic Games/Legends|Galactic Games]]|''[[Jedi Quest: The Dangerous Games]]''}} The '''Galan starfighter''' was a sleek, small two-seater [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]] used by the [[Galacian]]s. In [[44 BBY/Legends|44 BBY]], [[Queen/Legends|Queen]] [[Veda (Galacian)|Veda]] of [[Gala]] loaned one of the starfighters to [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Qui-Gon Jinn/Legends|Qui-Gon Jinn]] and his [[Padawan/Legends|Padawan]] [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]], who would pilot it during the [[Mission to Melida/Daan]]. More than [[26 BBY/Legends|seventeen years later]], a Galan starfighter was used by Obi-Wan Kenobi and his apprentice [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Anakin Skywalker]] on their assignments to [[Euceron]] and [[Haariden]]. {{Ship-stub}} ==Appearances== *''[[Jedi Apprentice: The Defenders of the Dead]]'' {{1st}} *''[[Jedi Apprentice: The Uncertain Path]]'' {{Mo}} *''[[Jedi Quest: The Dangerous Games]]'' *''[[Jedi Quest: The Master of Disguise]]'' *''[[Jedi Quest: The Moment of Truth]]'' ==Sources== *''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |de=Galan-Sternjäger |es=Caza estelar Galan |fi=Galalainen tähtihävittäjä }} [[Category:Starfighter classes]]
